task_completion.description: Open the edit page for the 'Vintage Camera Lens' product in WooCommerce.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress admin interface is visible, showing the 'Edit Product' page with the title 'Vintage Camera Lens'.

task_completion.description: Set the product's catalog visibility to hidden.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Publish' panel on the right side, the 'Catalog visibility' setting is shown as 'Hidden'.

task_completion.description: Set the product's inventory status to out of stock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product data' section under the 'Inventory' tab, the 'Stock status' dropdown is set to 'Out of stock'.

task_completion.description: Append the discontinued notice to the product short description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product short description' text editor, the exact text '**DISCONTINUED: This item is no longer available.**' is visible at the end of the description.

task_completion.description: Save the changes made to the product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message such as 'Product updated.' is visible at the top of the page, or the 'Update' button in the Publish panel has been clicked.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the WooCommerce admin panel.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface with the WordPress admin dashboard, not a terminal or command-line interface.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the form fields and dropdowns.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show dropdown menus being opened, text being typed into the editor, and buttons being clicked, rather than just inspecting or modifying the DOM.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct product.
integrity.visual_evidence: The product title 'Vintage Camera Lens' or SKU 'VCL-50MM' is clearly visible on the edit page where changes are being made.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Product Name: Vintage Camera Lens. Target SKU: VCL-50MM. Expected Stock Status: outofstock. Expected Visibility: Hidden (exclude-from-search and exclude-from-catalog). Expected Notice Text to append: '**DISCONTINUED: This item is no longer available.**'.
